evidence_summary: VN-11 flags غَنِمْتُم as finite verb dictionary leakage needing second-person plural agreement visible.
VN-11 flags تَسْتَغِيثُونَ as finite imperfect verb leakage needing form and plural subject marking.
VN-11 flags ٱقْذِفِيهِ as a command host with attached object pronoun that must be visible.
VN-11 flags قَبَضْنَٰهُ as a finite verb with first-person plural subject marking and an attached object pronoun.
VN-11 keeps فَأَهْلَكْنَاهُمْ as component-only finite verb plus subject and object suffix evidence.
VN-11 flags هُمْ as a pronoun/function token candidate collision, not a verb-entry propagation row.
VN-11 keeps لِفُرُوجِهِمْ as component-only lām plus host plus attached possessor evidence.
VN-11 flags فُرُوجَهُمْ as a suffix-bearing nominal row needing visible possessor accounting.
VN-11 flags مَغَانِمُ as a nominal/POS row routed through a verb entry and needing token-only metadata.
VN-11 flags ٱلْغَيْثَ as component-only evidence with article and nominal/POS leakage risk.
VN-11 flags فِضَّةٍۢ as readable string output that still needs nominal case and role metadata before rich certification.
VN-11 flags كُفُّوٓا۟ as a POS-collision row needing imperative/verb review rather than noun-entry propagation.
